groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, aquarium_then_vehicle direction, random ordering #8.

sentences.text: The veterinarian examined the sick betta fish after removing it from the heated tank in the clinic.
The veterinarian examined the sick betta fish after removing it from the heated tank in the clinic. Every weekend the family gathered to watch the clownfish swim circles in their living room tank.

The veterinarian examined the sick betta fish after removing it from the heated tank in the clinic. Every weekend the family gathered to watch the clownfish swim circles in their living room tank. My daughter named every single fish in the tank and gets upset if we mix them up.
